'''dhodajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leady|leady]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leady|leady]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhodajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodajithi|dhodajithi]] || [[word:dhodajiji|dhodajiji]] || [[word:dhodajishi|dhodajishi]] || [[word:dhodajiki|dhodajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodajuthuthu|dhodajuthuthu]] || [[word:dhodajujuju|dhodajujuju]] || [[word:dhodajushushu|dhodajushushu]] || [[word:dhodajukuku|dhodajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodajuthu|dhodajuthu]] || [[word:dhodajuju|dhodajuju]] || [[word:dhodajushu|dhodajushu]] || [[word:dhodajuku|dhodajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodajufthuf|dhodajufthuf]] || [[word:dhodajufjuf|dhodajufjuf]] || [[word:dhodajufshuf|dhodajufshuf]] || [[word:dhodajufkuf|dhodajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodajethe|dhodajethe]] || [[word:dhodajeje|dhodajeje]] || [[word:dhodajeshe|dhodajeshe]] || [[word:dhodajeke|dhodajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodajothotho|dhodajothotho]] || [[word:dhodajojojo|dhodajojojo]] || [[word:dhodajoshosho|dhodajoshosho]] || [[word:dhodajokoko|dhodajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodajotho|dhodajotho]] || [[word:dhodajojo|dhodajojo]] || [[word:dhodajosho|dhodajosho]] || [[word:dhodajoko|dhodajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodajofthof|dhodajofthof]] || [[word:dhodajofjof|dhodajofjof]] || [[word:dhodajofshof|dhodajofshof]] || [[word:dhodajofkof|dhodajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodajĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodajĂŠthĂŠ|dhodajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodajĂŠjĂŠ|dhodajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodajĂŠshĂŠ|dhodajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodajĂŠkĂŠ|dhodajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodajathatha|dhodajathatha]] || [[word:dhodajajaja|dhodajajaja]] || [[word:dhodajashasha|dhodajashasha]] || [[word:dhodajakaka|dhodajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodajatha|dhodajatha]] || [[word:dhodajaja|dhodajaja]] || [[word:dhodajasha|dhodajasha]] || [[word:dhodajaka|dhodajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodajafthaf|dhodajafthaf]] || [[word:dhodajafjaf|dhodajafjaf]] || [[word:dhodajafshaf|dhodajafshaf]] || [[word:dhodajafkaf|dhodajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhodajasha|dhodajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodajshĂ«sha|dhodajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodajrosha|dhodajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodajmusha|dhodajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodajyasha|dhodajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodajnkshĂ«sha|godhodajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodajnkrosha|godhodajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodajnkmusha|godhodajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodajnkyasha|godhodajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhodadajasha|dhodadajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodadajshĂ«sha|dhodadajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodadajrosha|dhodadajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodadajmusha|dhodadajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodadajyasha|dhodadajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodadajnkshĂ«sha|godhodadajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodadajnkrosha|godhodadajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodadajnkmusha|godhodadajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodadajnkyasha|godhodadajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhedĂŠjasha|dhedĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhedĂŠjshĂ«sha|dhedĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhedĂŠjrosha|dhedĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhedĂŠjmusha|dhedĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhedĂŠjyasha|dhedĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhedĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|godhedĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhedĂŠjnkrosha|godhedĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhedĂŠjnkmusha|godhedĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhedĂŠjnkyasha|godhedĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhodfajasha|dhodfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodfajshĂ«sha|dhodfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodfajrosha|dhodfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodfajmusha|dhodfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodfajyasha|dhodfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodfajnkshĂ«sha|godhodfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodfajnkrosha|godhodfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodfajnkmusha|godhodfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodfajnkyasha|godhodfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
